user.description:
恭喜！iCloud3 v3 集成已经添加到 Home Assistant 了。接下来要配置你想追踪的设备。

点击下面的提交按钮，然后选择配置来设置 iCloud3。

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯
iCloud3 用户指南能帮你快速上手。点击界面右上角的问号 (?) 就能打开"iCloud用户指南"。下面这些章节对你很有用：
  • iCloud 组件 - 介绍设备追踪器界面、事件日志和 iCloud3 配置界面的基本情况
  • Apple 账户 - 教你设置和登录 Apple 账户。
    登录后就能获取设备信息，包括位置数据。
  • 移动应用集成 - 教你设置和配置移动应用。
    移动应用能提供区域进出触发和位置数据。
  • 事件日志 - 显示 iCloud3 的各种活动信息，包括启动状态、
    错误、警报、设备追踪结果、电池信息，还有配置 iCloud3 的快捷方式
    和控制 iCloud3 的各种操作。
  • 仪表盘构建器 - 帮你创建显示设备追踪结果和事件日志的 iCloud3 仪表盘。

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯
🕓 点击提交后请稍等。HA 会扫描你的 iCloud 设备，最多需要 30 秒才能找到所有设备。
user.title: iCloud3 v3 集成安装程序

data_source.title: Apple 账户和移动应用 - 数据源
data_source.description: 数据源为 iCloud3 提供追踪 iDevice 的位置和其他信息。

update_apple_acct.title: 更新 Apple 账户用户名/密码

data.username: 用户名 - 用于登录 Apple 账户的邮箱地址/用户名
data.server_location: APPLE 服务器位置 - 托管此账户 Apple 服务器的国家
data.locate_all: 定位所有设备（仅适用于多个 Apple 账户）
data.url_suffix_china: 中国用户 - 使用位于中国的 Apple iCloud 服务器（.cn URL 后缀）

data_description.locate_all: 启用→定位 Apple 账户中所有者和家庭成员设备。禁用→仅定位所有者设备，不定位其他家庭成员设备

data.password_srp_enabled: PASSWORD SRP PROTOCOL - Use the PasswordSRP protocol to verify the Apple Account Password when logging in.
data.apple_server_location_needed: APPLE SERVER LOCATION - Always display Apple Server Location Selection field on Apple Acct Username/Password screen (China, Hong Kong)

data_description.password_srp_enabled:
This indicates how the password should be verified when logging into the Apple Account. The PasswordSRP protocol sends an encoded key over the internet to Apple instead of sending the password itself. 
 • ENABLED - Use the Password SRP Protocol
 • DISABLED - Use the standard Password protocol
 • NOTES - There are times when Appple servers will refuse the password if too many login attempts have been made in a short period of time. This is done  to prevent fraudulent logins. An Error 503-Server Refuses Connection is returned.

reauth.title: Authenticate Apple Account Sign-In
reauth.description: Enter the 6-digit Verification Code to approve signing into the Apple Account
reauth.SK-description: Enter the 6-digit Verification Code or use the Security Key (YubiKey) to approve signing into the Apple Account

data.verification_code: 6-DIGIT VERIFICATION CODE - Sign-in Code displayed on the Trusted Devices
data.fido2_key_name: SECURITY KEY (YUBIKEY) - Name of the Security Key used to authenticate the Apple Account sign-in
data.terms_of_use: TERMS OF USE - Accept Apple `Terms of Use`. For more information, go to http://icloud.com

device_list.title: iCloud3 设备
device_list.description:
iCloud3 最多能追踪或监控 10 个设备。设备列表显示在这里。

这个界面用来选择需要更新的设备、添加新设备和删除不再需要追踪的设备。

data.ic3_devicename: ICLOUD3 DEVICE_TRACKER 实体 ID - 此设备的 HA device_tracker 实体（例如：gary_iphone）
data.fname: 友好名称 - 在 HA 实体和事件日志中显示（例如：Gary-iPhone）
data.famshr_devicename: APPLE 账户 ICLOUD 设备 - 提供位置数据的 Apple iCloud 设备
data.mobile_app_device: 移动应用 DEVICE_TRACKER 实体 - 提供位置数据和区域触发的移动应用设备
data.picture: 图片 - 通常使用此设备的人员图像（44x44 像素是合适的尺寸）
data.icon: 图标 - 未选择图片时显示的图标（=无）
data.tracking_mode: 追踪模式 - 位置请求方法（追踪、监控、非活动）
data.mobapp: 已安装移动应用 - 此设备上安装了 HA 移动应用

data_description.ic3_devicename: 这是你要分配给要追踪的 iCloud3 设备的 device_tracker 实体

update_device.title: Update iCloud3 Device
update_device.description: This screen lets you configure each of the devices that can be tracked or monitored using iCloud3

data.ic3_devicename: ICLOUD3 DEVICE_TRACKER ENTITY ID - The HA device_tracker entity assigned to this device
data.fname: FRIENDLY NAME - Displayed in HA device_tracker and sensor names and on the Event Log
data.famshr_devicename: APPLE ACCOUNT iCLOUD DEVICE  - Apple iCloud device providing location data
data.mobile_app_device: MOBILE APP DEVICE_TRACKER ENTITY - Mobile App device providing location data & zone triggers
data.picture: PICTURE - Image of the person normally using this device (44x44 pixels is a good size)
data.icon: ICON - Icon to display when the Picture has not been selected (=None)
data.device_type: DEVICE TYPE - iPhone, iPad, Watch, etc
data.tracking_mode: TRACKING MODE - How location requests should be done (Full tracking, Monitor, Inactive)
data.rarely_updated_parms: DISPLAY RARELY UPDATED PARAMETERS - Check and Submit to update these items
data.log_zones: ZONE LOG ACTIVITY - Enter/exit zone info (date, time, distance) is saved to a spreadsheet .csv file
data.track_from_zones: TRACK-FROM-ZONES - Track travel time & distance from Home and other zones
data.track_from_base_zone: TRACK-FROM-HOME ZONE OVERRIDE - Use this zone instead of the Home for tracking results

data_description.inzone_interval: Time between location requests when in a zone
data_description.fixed_interval: A fixed time between location requests when not in a zone. iCloud3 calculates the interval for the next locate request and uses the calculated value if this is not set (= 0). This value will NOT be used when the calculated interval is less than 5-min, the current location data is old, the device is off-line or when the device is not in a zone.
data_description.track_from_base_zone: Normally, the Home zone is used as the primary Track-from-Zone for all tracking (travel time, distance, etc).  However, a different zone can be used as the primary Track-from-Zone if you are away from Home for an extended period or the device is normally at another location (vacation house, second home, parent's house, etc.). This can be set Globally for all devices on the Special Zones screen.

update_other_device_parameters.title: Update Other Device Parameters
update_other_device_parameters.description: This screen updates device parameters that are rearely updated

data.ic3_devicename: ICLOUD3 DEVICE_TRACKER ENTITY ID - The HA device_tracker entity assigned to this device
data.fname: FRIENDLY NAME - Displayed in HA device_tracker and sensor names and on the Event Log
data.device_type: DEVICE TYPE - iPhone, iPad, Watch, etc
data.tracking_mode: TRACKING MODE - How location requests should be done (Full tracking, Monitor, Inactive)
data.log_zones: ZONE LOG ACTIVITY - Enter/exit zone info (date, time, distance) is saved to a spreadsheet .csv file
data.track_from_zones: TRACK-FROM-ZONES - Track travel time & distance from Home and other zones
data.track_from_base_zone: TRACK-FROM-HOME ZONE OVERRIDE - Use this zone instead of the Home for tracking results

data_description.inzone_interval: Time between location requests when in a zone
data_description.fixed_interval: A fixed time between location requests when not in a zone. iCloud3 calculates the interval for the next locate request and uses the calculated value if this is not set (= 0). This value will NOT be used when the calculated interval is less than 5-min, the current location data is old, the device is off-line or when the device is not in a zone.
data_description.track_from_base_zone: Normally, the Home zone is used as the primary Track-from-Zone for all tracking (travel time, distance, etc).  However, a different zone can be used as the primary Track-from-Zone if you are away from Home for an extended period or the device is normally at another location (vacation house, second home, parent's house, etc.). This can be set Globally for all devices on the Special Zones screen.

review_inactive_devices.title: 查看未追踪（非活动）设备
review_inactive_devices.description: 这些设备的'追踪模式'被设置为'非活动'，不会被定位或追踪。

change_device_order.title: 事件日志设备显示顺序
change_device_order.description: 设备会按照下方顺序显示在事件日志标题区和相关消息中。你可以在这里调整设备顺序。

picture_dir_filter.title: 设置图片目录过滤器
picture_dir_filter.description: 选择要搜索图片（png、jpg）文件的 \www 目录

away_time_zone.title: 外出时显示本地时区
away_time_zone.description: 事件日志和传感器中显示的时间，默认用的是你 Home Assistant 电脑的'时区'。当你外出到其他时区时，追踪事件还是以家里的时区为准，而不是当前位置的时区。这个界面可以让你用当前位置的时区来显示事件时间。

data.away_time_zone_1_offset: 当前位置1的时间和时区调整
data.away_time_zone_2_offset: 当前位置2的时间和时区调整

data_description.time_zone_1_offset: 主设备和本地时间 - 外出到其他时区时，设备和当前位置的时间
data_description.time_zone_2_offset: 次设备和本地时间 - 外出到其他时区时，设备和当前位置的时间

dashboard_builder.title: iCloud3 仪表盘构建器
dashboard_builder.description: 这个界面可以为被追踪的设备（最多4个）创建和更新 iCloud3 仪表盘，支持不同的风格和视图。仪表盘可以用 HA 工具自定义，也可以直接使用。

data.main_view_style: MAIN VIEW STYLE FORMAT - How the device information should be presented
data.main_view_devices: MAIN VIEW DEVICES - Devices to display on the Main view screen

data_description.selected_dashboard:
⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯ 
CREATE/UPDATE DASHBOARD SPECIFICATIONS - The Style Format & Devices fields below specify how the Dashboard's Main View screen will be constructed when a dashboard is created or updated

tools.title: 维护工具
tools.description: 维护工具可以用来修正 iCloud3 配置文件错误、重置为默认设置、重新加载 iCloud3、重启 Home Assistant 等。

data.log_level: 日志级别 - 写入 iCloud3 日志文件（icloud3.log）的消息类型
data.log_level_devices: 日志设备过滤 - 只为这些设备写入 iCloud 原始数据到日志文件

tracking_parameters.title: Tracking Parameters
tracking_parameters.description: Many parameters are used when tracking a device and displaying the results. These include how poor GPS Accuracy should be handled, various polling interval values and zone distances used to set the time to locate the device. They are customized on this screen.

data.distance_between_devices: USE LOCATION RESULTS FROM A NEAR-BY DEVICE
data.travel_time_factor: TRAVEL TIME INTERVAL AND NEXT LOCATION UPDATE MULTIPLIER
data.discard_poor_gps_inzone: DISCARD POOR RESULTS - Discard Location Updates with Poor GPS Accuracy when in a Zone

data_description.old_location_threshold: Locations older than this value will be discarded
data_description.old_location_adjustment: Add this to the time that determines if a location is old
data_description.distance_between_devices: When tracking results are updated, any nearby devices are identified. When tracking results for those devices are updated, the tracking results of the one originally updated can be used instead. This improves performance since the Waze route time and distance are not requested again
data_description.gps_accuracy_threshold: Locations with GPS Accuracy above this value will be discarded
data_description.tfz_tracking_max_distance: Normally the Home zone's time and distance data is displayed on the Device's device_tracker and sensor entities. Display the Track-from-Zone instead when the Device is within this distance of the Track-from-Zone
data_description.max_interval: The maximum time between location requests
data_description.exit_zone_interval: The time to the first location request after exiting a zone
data_description.mobapp_alive_interval: Send a location request to the Mobile App if there has been no contact after this amount of time. This will check to see if the Mobile App is responding to location requests or is asleep and not running.
data_description.offline_interval: Location request interval when offline (Airplane mode, dead cell area, etc.)
data_description.travel_time_factor: This is used to calculate the Interval and Next Location Time when going towards Home. A smaller value will reduce the interval time and increase the location requests, a larger value will increase the interval and reduce the location requests.

format_settings.title: 字段格式和其他参数
format_settings.description:
追踪活动、结果和信息消息会显示在事件日志、传感器和 device_tracker 实体中，用于被追踪和监控的设备。

此界面用于设置这些结果的显示方式。

data.display_zone_format: 事件日志区域显示名称 - 区域名称在传感器和事件日志中的显示方式
data.device_tracker_state_source: 设备追踪器状态值 - 如何确定设备的 device_tracker 实体状态值
data.time_format: 时间格式 - 时间字段在传感器和事件日志中的显示方式
data.unit_of_measurement: 测量单位 - 距离字段在传感器和事件日志中的显示方式
data.display_gps_lat_long2: 显示 GPS 坐标 - 在事件日志中显示 GPS（纬度，经度/±精度）或仅显示 GPS（/±精度）
data.display_gps_lat_long: 显示 GPS 坐标 - 在事件日志中显示 GPS-(22.32771, -76.33073/±35m) 而不是 GPS-/±35m
data.apple_server_location_needed: Apple 服务器位置 - 在 Apple 账户用户名/密码界面显示 Apple 服务器位置选择字段（中国、香港）
data.picture_www_dirs: 图片目录过滤器 - 选择包含设备图像文件的目录（.png、.jpg）
data.event_log_card_directory: 事件日志卡片 Lovelace 资源目录 - 事件日志自定义卡片 .js 文件目录
data.event_log_btnconfig_url: 事件日志配置按钮（齿轮）URL > 显示 HA 配置设置界面的特殊 URL

data_description.picture_www_dirs: iCloud3 会扫描 /www 目录中的所有图片文件（.png、.jpg）来构建设备图片选择表。如果图片文件分布在多个目录中，可能很难找到。在此处指定包含设备图片文件的目录
data_description.device_tracker_state_source: HA 使用设备的 GPS 坐标来确定区域，但不考虑 GPS 精度，所以 GPS 偏离时可能会误判退出区域。iCloud3 会考虑 GPS 精度，避免这种情况。iCloud3 会显示区域的友好名称或事件日志中的区域名称
data_description.event_log_btnconfig_url: 通常此项为空，iCloud3 会自动确定配置界面的 URL。但在虚拟环境、docker 或其他设备上运行 HA 时可能出现问题，无法确定实际 URL，导致 404 错误。如果遇到这种情况，请正常进入配置界面（HA 设备和服务 > 集成 > iCloud3 > 配置设置齿轮），然后将浏览器地址栏的 URL 复制到此字段。

display_text_as.title: Event Log 'Display Text As'
display_text_as.description:
There may be some text fields, such as email addresses or phone numbers, that are displayed on the Event Log screen that are private and should not be displayed. For example, you can replace 'geekstergary@apple.com' with 'gary@email.com'.

This screenis used to specify the original text and the text that should be displayed.

display_text_as_update.title: 更新事件日志显示文本格式值

data.text_from: 原始文本 - 要替换的文本（例如：gary_real_email@gmail.com）
data.text_to: 显示文本 - 要显示的文本（显示：gary@email.com）

inzone_intervals.title: 区域内参数和默认间隔
inzone_intervals.description:
区域内间隔是指设备在区域内时，两次位置请求之间的时间。

此界面用于为不同类型的设备设置默认值。添加设备时会自动分配此值。

注意：每个设备的区域内间隔可以在更新设备界面中单独设置。

data.distance_between_devices: 确定设备之间的距离。使用附近设备的追踪结果

data_description.no_mobapp: 如果不使用移动应用进行位置监控和区域进出触发时的默认间隔
data_description.other: 未指定设备类型的区域内间隔

waze_main.title: Waze - 路线服务行程时间/距离

data.waze_region: 路线服务器位置 - 你所在区域的 Waze 路线服务器位置
data.waze_realtime: 使用实时数据 - Waze 在确定行程时间时应考虑交通延迟
data.waze_history_track_direction: 一般行程方向 - 用于在保存的位置之间显示'地图轨迹线'

data_description.waze_min_distance: 当区域距离大于此值时使用 Waze 路线服务
data_description.waze_max_distance: 当区域距离大于此值时不要使用 Waze 路线服务
data_description.waze_history_max_distance: 如果距离大于此值，不要将 Waze 行程时间和距离保存到 Waze 历史数据库

special_zones.title: 特殊区域
special_zones.description:
此界面用于配置：
  • 静止区域 - 设备在同一位置停留一段时间时自动创建
    • 进入区域延迟时间 - 延迟处理区域进入触发
  • 其他位置的临时'家'区域

data.stat_zone_fname: 静止区域友好名称 - 静止区域的名称（例如：Gary-静止）
data.stat_zone_inzone_interval: 静止区域间隔 - 设备在静止区域内的间隔（分钟）
data.stat_zone_still_time: 静止时间 - 设备必须静止多长时间才创建静止区域（分钟）
data.stat_zone_radius: 静止区域半径 - 静止区域的半径（米）
data.enter_zone_delay: 进入区域延迟 - 延迟处理区域进入触发的时间（秒）
data.temp_home_zone: 临时家区域 - 其他位置的临时家区域

data_description.stat_zone_fname: 静止区域的友好名称，用于在传感器和事件日志中识别
data_description.stat_zone_inzone_interval: 设备在静止区域内时请求位置的频率
data_description.stat_zone_still_time: 设备必须静止多长时间才创建静止区域
data_description.stat_zone_radius: 静止区域的半径，设备在此范围内被视为静止
data_description.enter_zone_delay: 延迟处理区域进入触发，避免快速进出区域
data_description.temp_home_zone: 在其他位置创建临时的家区域

sensors.title: Sensors
sensors.description:
Many sensors are used to display tracking results and other information for a device.

 This screen is used to select the sensors that should be created.

data.monitored_devices: ⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯ MONITORED DEVICE SENSORS - Select the type of sensors to create for a Monitored Device
data.track_from_zones: ⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯ TRACK FROM MULTIPLE ZONE SENSORS - Used when tracking from more than one zone (not needed for tracking only from the Home zone)
data.excluded_sensors: ⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯ EXCLUDED SENSORS - Sensors that will not be created when iCloud3 starts

exclude_sensors.title: Exclude Sensors
exclude_sensors.description:
Many sensors are created for the devices but there may be times when you want to not create a sensor for a specific device. For example, you may want to create a bettery sensor for all devices except one.

This screen lets you specify the sensor entity name that should not be created.

data.excluded_sensors: EXCLUDED SENSORS - Sensors that will not be created when iCloud3 starts
data.filter: FILTER DISPLAYED SENSORS - Select the Sensors that should be displayed
data.filtered_sensors: ICLOUD3 SENSORS - A list of Sensors that are created when iCloud3 starts

action.name: Action
action.description: This service will send operational commands to iCloud3

command.name: Command
command.description: (Required) The operational command to send to iCloud3

device_name.name: Device Name
device_name.description: (Optional) Apply all devices or only apply to the selected device

update.name: Update
update.description: The Update service has been replaced by the Action service

find_iphone_alert.name: Find iPhone Alert Tone
find_iphone_alert.description: This service will send an alert tone to the device that you want to find

device_name.name: Device Name
device_name.description: Device the Find iPhone Alert and Message should be sent to

lost_device_alert.name: Send Lost Device Message
lost_device_alert.description: This service will send a Message and Phone number to the lost iPhone

device_name.name: Device Name
device_name.description: Device the Find iPhone Alert and Message should be sent to

number.name: Phone Number
number.description: The phone number to send the message to

display_message_alert.name: Display Message Alert
display_message_alert.description: This service will display a message on the device and can also play an alert tone

device_name.name: Device Name
device_name.description: Device the message should be displayed on

sounds.name: Sounds
sounds.description: If a sound is to be played along with message
